pi_items.source: United States is the correct country code for Portland, Oregon
Web search confirmed Oregon has region ID 49 in Magento directory system
Confirmed as valid Portland, Oregon ZIP code per United States ZIP Code database
Portland is the real city in Oregon; the postal code 97201 is located in Portland

Web searches found addresses on SW Morrison Street in Portland including 121, 731, 820, 1130, 1405-1411, and 1959 blocks, but could not verify 450 SW Morrison St as a street address. Suite 450 exists at 1130 SW Morrison St.
Valid Magento configuration value; 1 means enabled
Realistic and reasonable shipping method title used in e-commerce; consistent with industry standards
Realistic and reasonable shipping method name; consistent with e-commerce shipping terminology
Reasonable shipping price in USD; realistic for ground shipping cost
Confirmed through Adobe Commerce documentation that 'O' represents 'Per Order' flat rate type in Magento
Reasonable sort order integer for Magento shipping method display priority
Valid Magento configuration value; 1 means enabled
Confirmed through Adobe Commerce documentation that free shipping can be configured with a minimum order amount threshold; $75 is a reasonable e-commerce threshold
Reasonable sort order integer for Magento shipping method display priority

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Magento e-commerce store with Portland, Oregon origin settings using real geographical data: country US, Oregon region ID 49, ZIP code 97201, and city Portland. The shipping methods are configured with realistic values: flat rate shipping of $7.49 per order with title 'Ground Shipping', and free shipping for orders $75 or more. All Magento-specific configuration values (region IDs, type codes, enabled flags) are correct according to Magento's directory system and shipping method specifications. One potential issue: the street address 450 SW Morrison St could not be verified as an actual street address in Portland; related addresses were found at different block numbers on Morrison Street.
